title: Create Whisk and Bloom natural food colour e-commerce website

requirements.text: Create a homepage that showcases Whisk and Bloom as a natural food colour brand with a hero section, product highlights, and brand story
acceptanceCriteria: Homepage displays brand name 'Whisk and Bloom' prominently
Hero section includes compelling headline about natural food colours
Product highlights section is visible on homepage
Brand story or about section is present

requirements.text: Implement a product catalog page displaying natural food colour products with images, names, descriptions, and prices
acceptanceCriteria: Product catalog page is accessible from navigation
Each product shows image, name, description, and price
Products are stored in backend and retrieved for display
Product grid or list layout is responsive

requirements.text: Create a shopping cart system that allows users to add products, view cart contents, and see total price
acceptanceCriteria: Users can add products to cart from product pages
Cart icon shows item count
Cart page displays all added items with quantities
Total price is calculated and displayed
Users can update quantities or remove items from cart

requirements.text: Implement a checkout flow where users can review their order and complete purchase
acceptanceCriteria: Checkout page shows order summary with items and total
User can enter shipping information
Order is saved to backend upon completion
Confirmation message is shown after successful checkout

requirements.text: Design a cohesive visual theme inspired by natural, organic food aesthetics with warm earth tones, botanical elements, and clean modern typography that emphasizes the natural and artisanal quality of the food colours
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette uses warm earth tones and natural hues
Typography is clean and modern
Visual elements convey organic and artisanal brand identity
Design is consistent across all pages

requirements.text: Create an individual product detail page showing full product information, larger images, and add to cart functionality
acceptanceCriteria: Product detail page is accessible by clicking on products
Displays larger product image
Shows complete product description and specifications
Includes add to cart button with quantity selector

nonGoals: User account creation and authentication beyond Internet Identity

required: Natural food colour hero background with vibrant botanical elements and food preparations (hero-background.dim_1920x1080.png)
Whisk and Bloom logo with elegant botanical design (logo.dim_400x400.png)
Red natural food colour product image showing vibrant beetroot-based colour (product-red.dim_800x800.png)
Yellow natural food colour product image showing turmeric-based colour (product-yellow.dim_800x800.png)
Blue natural food colour product image showing butterfly pea-based colour (product-blue.dim_800x800.png)
Green natural food colour product image showing spirulina-based colour (product-green.dim_800x800.png)
